name: ENTREPRENEUR UNIVERSE BRIGHT GROUP
business: The company provides consulting services and marketing services in China through its PRC subsidiary, focusing on strategic digital marketing and consulting for start-up and small-size companies. It assists clients in connecting with e-commerce platforms, primarily through the Chuangyetianxia mobile application. On February 10, 2026, it acquired Heng Ying International Investment Limited, which holds a Hong Kong money lender license, to enter the fintech sector.
sellsTo: private companies needing digital marketing services

exposures.sentence: Our PRC subsidiary provides services aimed at connecting businesses with e-commerce platforms.
The Company executed this acquisition to establish a foundation for its planned entry into the financial technology (fintech) sector.

catalysts.event: Renewal of Heng Ying's money lender license
catalysts.sentence: Heng Ying holds a Hong Kong money lender license, which is currently pending routine renewal in April 2026.
